description_long: This is a tall, multi-sectioned shelving unit constructed primarily from wood, featuring a natural wood grain pattern with darker accents. The structure consists of three vertical columns, each with multiple open shelves, and some sections include metallic rods or racks, likely for hanging items such as clothes or accessories. The shelves vary in size, with some compartments appearing to be drawers or bins, possibly for additional storage. The overall design is open and accessible from the front, with no visible doors or enclosed compartments. The unit is supported by slender legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its robust and practical design makes it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban storage spaces.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with multiple shelves, racks, and storage bins, supported by slender legs. Features a natural wood finish with dark accents and metallic hanging rods.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three columns, open shelves, storage bins, and metallic racks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the vertical structure, with less detail of the internal compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelving unit, with the arrangement of shelves and racks mirrored from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and vertical supports, with some racks and bins visible.
